nasb.text: And when Peter came up to Jerusalem, those who were circumcised took issue with him,

esv.text: So when Peter went up to Jerusalem, the circumcision party criticized him, saying,

cnv.text: 彼得上到耶路撒冷的時候，那些守割禮的人與他爭論，

ccb.text: 彼得一回到耶路撒冷，严守割礼的门徒就指责他：

csbs.text: 可是当彼得上到耶路撒冷的时候，那些割礼派的人却批评他，
